---
title: "TransformsV2 Pipeline Library"
format: html
---

Saved **TransformsV2** pipelines live in a central folder on your machine so you can reuse them across the Transform Widget and Tensor Inspector without copying JSON by hand.

## Where pipelines are stored

WhiskerToolbox stores library files under your application config directory:

```
{config}/pipelines/transforms_v2/*.json
```

On Linux this is typically:

```
~/.config/WhiskerToolbox/pipelines/transforms_v2/
```

Each file is a [`PipelineDescriptor`](../../developer/transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd) JSON document (transform steps, optional pre-reductions, optional range reduction).

## Transform Widget

Open **View → Tools → Transforms V2** and expand the **Pipeline JSON** section.

| Control | Action |
|---------|--------|
| **Library...** | Browse, preview, load, save, import, export, or delete library entries |
| **Save to Library** | Quick-save the current pipeline with a name |
| **Load...** / **Save...** | Pick any file (defaults to the library folder) |

Use **Library...** to manage your collection. Use **Load** inside the dialog to apply a saved pipeline to the widget.

## Tensor Inspector (column configuration)

When configuring a tensor column in the **Tensor Designer**:

1. Open **Load from Library...** to pick a saved pipeline.
2. The JSON is copied into the column’s pipeline field and validated automatically.
3. Alternatively, use **Request from Transforms V2** to design a pipeline interactively and send it back.

Interval-property columns (start/end/duration only) do not use a transform pipeline; the library controls are disabled in that mode.

## Tips

- Give pipelines meaningful names when saving; the name becomes `metadata.name` and the filename stem.
- Pre-reductions and range reductions in JSON are preserved even though the Transform Widget step list only edits transform steps.
- Command-sequence JSON used by **Triage Session** is a different format and is not stored in this library.

## See also

- [Transform Widget](transforms_v2_widget.qmd)
- [Developer: Pipeline library](../../developer/transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd)
